capabilities.intent: List templates available for SMS and email for a given customer and profile
capabilities.business_value: Users can browse pre-defined templates scoped to their account and profile before composing a message
flow: Receive customerId and profileId as input (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:32)
Delegate to GetTemplatesForSmsAndEmail or GetTemplates (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:40)
Return filtered template list scoped to customer+profile
constraints: CustomerId scoping required for tenant isolation
ProfileId optional — if null returns customer-wide templates

capabilities.intent: Retrieve a single template by ID
capabilities.business_value: Allows fetching full template content (body, subject) before sending or editing
flow: Receive templateId as input (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:45)
Delegate to GetTemplateById (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:45)
Return single Template with channel-specific content
constraints: CustomerId isolation — must not return templates from other customers

capabilities.intent: Create a new message template with channel-specific content
capabilities.business_value: Allows administrators to define reusable message templates for SMS and/or email
flow: Receive template data (name, channel content) (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:50)
Call InsertAsync (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:50)
Return created template ID
constraints: CustomerId must be set on creation

capabilities.business_value: Allows editing template content without recreating it
flow: Receive templateId and updated fields (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:55)
Call UpdateAsync (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:55)
Return success/failure

capabilities.intent: Delete a message template and its channel-specific sub-entities
capabilities.business_value: Allows removing obsolete templates from the system
flow: Receive templateId (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:80)
Call Delete — cascades to TemplateSms (CASCADE) or handles TemplateEmails via code (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:80)
Return success
constraints: TemplateEmails: no CASCADE — must be deleted via code before template delete

capabilities.intent: Manage which profiles have visibility to which templates (M:M link/unlink)
capabilities.business_value: Controls which users see which templates — templates can be shared across profiles
flow: GetTemplateProfileMappings: list existing links (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:598)
LinkProfileToTemplates: associate a profile with multiple templates (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:603)
UnlinkProfileFromTemplates: remove all template links for a profile (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:608)
LinkTemplateToProfiles: associate a template with multiple profiles (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:613)
UnlinkTemplateFromProfiles: remove all profile links for a template (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:618)
constraints: No FK constraints on TemplateProfileMappings — application-managed integrity
rules: Templates are customer-scoped; profile mapping adds visibility restriction on top
One template can be visible to multiple profiles (M:M)

capabilities.intent: Define, update, and delete customer-specific dynamic merge field definitions
capabilities.business_value: Customers can define their own personalisation tokens (e.g. [CustomerRef]) for use in templates
flow: GetDynamicMergefields: list defined merge fields for customer (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:229)
InsertDynamicMergefield: create new merge field definition (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:242)
UpdateDynamicMergefield: rename or reconfigure existing merge field (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:417)
DeleteDynamicMergefield: remove merge field and process affected templates (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:428)
CheckMergefieldUsageAndProcessTemplates: validate templates still valid after delete (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Templates/TemplateService.cs:255)
rules: Management format {TYPE:NAME} used for definition — NOT runtime format
Runtime format is [FieldName] (square brackets) — resolved at send time

capabilities.intent: CRUD operations for system email templates (not business SMS templates)
capabilities.business_value: Manages HTML email templates used for system notifications (password reset, receipts etc.)
flow: Insert email template into EmailTemplates table (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Mails/Repository/EmailTemplateRepository.cs:17)
Update email template by name+language (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Mails/Repository/EmailTemplateRepository.cs:22)
Delete email template (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Mails/Repository/EmailTemplateRepository.cs:27)
GetAllTemplates: list all email templates (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Mails/Repository/EmailTemplateRepository.cs:32)
GetTemplateByNameEnum: lookup by name enum + languageId (evidence: ServiceAlert.Services/Mails/Repository/EmailTemplateRepository.cs:37)
constraints: Scoped by LanguageId and template Name
Separate from business SMS/email templates — system-use only
